text: A train leaves Chicago at 60 mph. Another leaves New York at 80 mph. Explain what additional information is required to determine when they meet.
A farmer has 17 sheep and all but 9 die. How many sheep remain?
If all roses are flowers and some flowers fade quickly, can we conclude that some roses fade quickly? Explain.
Compare the advantages and disadvantages of monolithic and microservice architectures.
Explain step-by-step how binary search works.
